accountCreated: Account created. Check your email to confirm, then sign in.
dataSync: Your data syncs securely to your account.

bgLocation.title: Background location
bgLocation.body: To record your run accurately, Running Coach collects your location in the background — including while the app is in the background or the screen is off.
bgLocation.bulletRecording: Collected only while a run is recording — never at any other time.
bgLocation.bulletRoute: Used to draw your route and compute distance, pace, and elevation.
bgLocation.bulletStored: Stored in your own account; never sold or shared with third parties.
bgLocation.privacyNote: See our Privacy Policy. When you tap Allow, Android will ask to use your location — choose “While using the app”; recording keeps going with the screen off.
bgLocation.privacyNoteBg: See our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>. Location is only used while a run is recording.
bgLocation.stepsIntro: When you continue, Android shows 3 prompts in a row. Here's what to tap:
bgLocation.step1: Location: choose “While using the app” and keep Precise turned on.
bgLocation.step2: “Allow all the time”: Android opens a settings screen — switch it to “Allow all the time” so tracking keeps working when the screen is off.
bgLocation.step3: Notifications: tap “Allow” so the recording notice can show while you run.
